prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约269名、17名、362名、399名、405名，2022年异常前移（17名）后持续后移，近3年从362名→399名→405名，呈逐 年后移趋势，2025年基准约405名；本省物理类计划2021年20人、2022年20人、2023年18人、2024年17人、2025年15人；2026年计划16人，较2025年增加1 人（扩招约6.7%），小幅扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第17名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第17–19 名区间，属全国顶尖高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与校园安全事件，但人大作为顶尖学府品牌效应稳固；抖音热度排名第44（较热），短视 频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常记录中未见人大明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估A+学科9个，其中与物理类招生相关的包括统计学A+、计算机科学与技术A、应 用经济学A+、工商管理A+等，学科实力极强，对高分理科生吸引力持续。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 统计学类、计算机类、人工智能等专业社会热度高热推荐/推荐，理科热门专业 热度高；本省2026年高考总人数约16.7万，较2025年（约17.2万）略有下降，物理类占比约68%–69%，估算物理类考生约11.4万，竞争压力略减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（15→16）、本省物理类考生数略降、理科 热门专业热度高但声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准405名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约431名，区间379–483名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 269, 17, 362, 399, and 405 respectively. After an abnormal forward shift in 2022 (17th), it has continuously moved backward, with the last three years showing a trend from 362 → 399 → 405, indicating a year-by-year backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 405. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 1 compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 6.7%), which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 17th on the main list (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 17–19 range in recent years, making it a top national university. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents, but as a top-tier institution, its brand effect remains solid. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an above-average level. No significant gap signals have been observed in historical admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 A+ disciplines, including Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Applied Economics A+, and Business Administration A+, indicating extremely strong academic strength and sustained appeal to high-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence are highly recommended/socially popular, with high popularity among science majors. The total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is approximately 167,000, slightly down from about 172,000 in 2025. Physics Category accounts for about 68%–69%, with an estimated 114,000 Physics Category examinees, slightly reducing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (15→16), the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees, the high popularity of science majors but negative reputation factors, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 405. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 431, with a range of 379–483.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Statistics (Data Scientist Plan)
- Computer Science (AI Full-Stack Engineer Plan)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovative Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Big Data Technology Innovative Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Economics and Mathematics Innovative Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Finance and Mathematics Innovative Talent Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Joint Training with Chinese Academy of Sciences in Chemistry Elite Direction, Life Resources Direction)
- Science Experimental Class (Yan Jici Physics Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (379–483), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 popular majors as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 400), you can focus on Tier 1 popular majors like Statistics and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 460), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 61, 68, 90, 72, and 83 respectively, with an overall fluctuation range of 61–90. In the past three years, rankings have hovered between 72 and 90, with a baseline of about 83 in 2025.\ nThe provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 19 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 17th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, with stable rankings in the 17th–19th range in recent years, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents, but as the highest institution of humanities and social sciences, the brand effect is solid; Douyin popularity ranking 44th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no obvious gap signals in historical admission anomalies; 9 A+ disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (Law, Journalism and Communication, Sociology, Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature, Statistics, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Chinese History, Philosophy, Foreign Languages and Literature, Political Science, Computer Science and Technology), 1 A- discipline (Physics), totaling 15 disciplines at A- or above, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are in a wait-and-see state with divergence, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 167,000, slightly down from about 172,000 in 2025, with History Category accounting for about 31%–32%, estimated at about 53,000 History Category candidates, slightly reducing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings in the 72–90 range, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the number of provincial History Category candidates, the solid top disciplinary strength of Renmin University but slightly negative reputation, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 83; the predicted minimum ranking is about 88, with a range of 38–138.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 60), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Law and Finance; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 120), mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety.
